overall.description: First-person exploration of the abandoned Pripyat river port in a post-apocalyptic video game (S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2). The player walks past the derelict Soviet-era cafe building with Cyrillic signage toward the waterfront during a stormy, orange-tinted dusk, with frequent lightning strikes illuminating the desolate landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned Soviet river port plaza with derelict cafe

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the stormy sky behind the cooling tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the abandoned Pripyat cafe building with broken windows and Cyrillic signage on the roof

entered.detail: large abandoned concrete building with broken windows and Cyrillic signage 'ПРИПЯТЬ' on the roof
tall hyperboloid industrial cooling tower visible in the distance against the orange sky
cracked concrete paving stones covering the ground with patches of dead grass
leafless birch trees scattered around the plaza perimeter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the abandoned Pripyat river port cafe, a derelict concrete structure with shattered glass windows. The camera walks forward past the building as lightning strikes in the distance, revealing the cooling tower against an orange stormy sky. The plaza is empty and overgrown, with dead trees lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from plaza to waterfront approach

events.description: river water becomes visible ahead as the cafe building recedes from view

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the cafe building passes out of view on the left and the waterfront approaches

entered.detail: rusted metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront embankment
calm river surface reflecting the orange storm clouds

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the cafe, the building passes behind on the left as the camera approaches the waterfront. A rusted metal railing appears on the right, and the river water comes into view, reflecting the stormy orange sky. The cooling tower remains visible ahead, shifting toward the center of the frame.

events.description: bright lightning strike flashes across the dark sky over the river water

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete waterfront path with the river on the right side

entered.detail: weathered concrete embankment and retaining wall along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along the waterfront promenade with the river now dominating the right side of the frame. A concrete embankment runs along the left. Lightning strikes over the water at 33 seconds, briefly illuminating the scene. The cooling tower shifts to the left as the path curves along the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: river shoreline with view of opposite bank

events.description: multiple lightning strikes illuminate the dark sky and water surface
lightning strike hits near the cooling tower on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline observing the storm over the water, then turning slightly toward the cooling tower

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the shoreline with frequent lightning strikes illuminating the river and sky. The cooling tower becomes more prominent on the left as the camera turns slightly. The metal railing falls behind as the path continues along the water's edge, with the concrete embankment now on the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a derelict concrete cafe toward a stormy waterfront, transitioning from an overgrown plaza to the edge of a reflecting river. It begins by walking past the shattered windows of the abandoned building as distant lightning reveals a cooling tower against an orange, stormy sky. As the cafe recedes to the left, the camera approaches the water's edge, where a rusted metal railing appears and the river begins to reflect the vivid atmospheric colors. The scene then shifts along the waterfront promenade, with the river dominating the right side of the frame and the cooling tower drifting toward the center as the path curves. Finally, the camera follows the shoreline through frequent lightning strikes that illuminate the water, while the concrete embankment shifts to the right and the cooling tower becomes prominent on the left.
